captains.name: Captain Vela
captains.pre_combat_hail: Wolf's Ear. Been tracking your wake for two jumps. Nothing personal, spacer. Your cargo's on my list. Pay, pass, or fight. Clock's running.
captains.surrender_line: Wolf's Ear yielding. Name your price. I've walked off worse deals.
captains.retreat_line: Wolf's Ear pulling out. Lean on the tracker if you want company. You'll see me again.
captains.victory_line: Tell your friends. Vela runs this stretch. Next spacer who thinks otherwise pays full.
captains.defeat_line: Good flying. The Wolf's Ear isn't the whole pack. Watch your wake, captain.

captains.name: Calder the Reader
captains.pre_combat_hail: Calder. Cold Read. I read ships before I fight them and yours reads expensive. You're going to want to listen before you reach for that stick.
captains.surrender_line: Fair read. You surprise me, spacer. Not many do. Walk it back and we walk away.
captains.retreat_line: Cold Read withdrawing. You read me as well as I read you. Good.
captains.victory_line: I said you'd want to listen. You didn't. Cold read proved out.
captains.defeat_line: I misread the ship. I never misread the pilot. Your turn, spacer.

captains.name: Captain Arantxa Koho
captains.pre_combat_hail: You running Guild paper through Verdant airspace? No. Then we've got a talk or we've got a fight. Your pick, quick.
captains.surrender_line: Stand down and drop the freight at the commissary. You hand me what the farmers can use, you fly out clean.
captains.retreat_line: Pulling back to cover. You bought my field three more days.
captains.victory_line: Guild freight doesn't fly through Verdant. Tell whoever sent you.
captains.defeat_line: Tell them Rin Koho stood in their way. Someone else will.

captains.name: Pesh Dane
captains.pre_combat_hail: Hey hey hey, easy. I'm Pesh. Yes, I only got the one thumb, yes I know, don't ask. Here's the deal: open the hold, I take a third, everyone walks. Counteroffer?
captains.surrender_line: Okay okay okay. Taking both hands off the stick. Don't shoot the guy down to his last thumb.
captains.retreat_line: Pesh is out! Pesh is OUT! Find someone else to kneecap.
captains.victory_line: See? Easy. You still got both thumbs. I'm the generous type.
captains.defeat_line: Aw come ON. I was so close.

captains.name: Anatolia Zbynek
captains.pre_combat_hail: Captain. Anatolia Zbynek, formerly of Guild Collections, currently freelance. Your manifest number appears on a seven-year-old contract the Guild declined to honor. I'm making them honor it. Through you.
captains.surrender_line: Acceptable. Transferring the debt to your ship's insurance pool. Your Guild rating will reflect the adjustment.
captains.victory_line: Contract 4412-C closed. Ledger balanced. Good afternoon.
captains.defeat_line: The Guild will send the next one. They owe me now.

captains.name: Harlowe Patel
captains.pre_combat_hail: Name's Harlowe. Call me Ink. I don't want to be here. You don't want to be here. Cargo to Amara's Children's Hospital covers your clean exit. I won't even look at your manifest.
captains.surrender_line: Thank you. I mean that. Name a donation figure you can live with, keep your cargo.
captains.retreat_line: Disengaging. I'm sorry. Take care out there.
captains.victory_line: I'll pay for your hull repairs. Silver, take the lead on the transfer.
captains.defeat_line: Tell Amara's I tried. I tried.

captains.name: Dowager Vess-Renaud
captains.pre_combat_hail: Captain. I am the Dowager Vess-Renaud, formerly of the Guild High Chamber, currently of whatever remains after they struck my name from the registry. You fly under their flag? Then you fly under their debts. Present your cargo.
captains.surrender_line: Good. Civility becomes us both. Transfer the goods with the decorum my station once commanded.
captains.retreat_line: The Chamberlain's Regret will not forget this indignity.
captains.victory_line: The Guild struck me from the registry. Today I wrote myself back in. Rewriting hurts.
captains.defeat_line: How absurdly final. The Guild will be pleased. They always are.

captains.name: Juno Okafor
captains.pre_combat_hail: You, Guild freighter. You're stealing from my people. I'm about to steal right back. Heads up. Name's Juno. Red Line Runner.
captains.surrender_line: Oh thank god. Okay. Okay. Offloading to the coordinates, stay calm, everyone stays calm. This is my first one.
captains.retreat_line: Pulling out. I'll be back with more ship. And maybe a crew.
captains.victory_line: TELL THEM JUNO OKAFOR DID THIS. No wait, don't tell them. Actually yeah, tell them.
captains.defeat_line: You won fair. Just make sure my people hear my name.

captains.name: Thayer Ngarrabal
captains.pre_combat_hail: You are, statistically, the least prepared ship I have registered in the last forty-three engagements. Surrender your hull data or demonstrate why the Collective's published evasion curves were, as I suspected, incomplete. Thayer Ngarrabal. Let us begin.
captains.surrender_line: Outstanding. Your hull scan will contribute significantly. I will log you as Cooperative Subject Seventeen.
captains.retreat_line: Inconclusive. The field trial requires reset. I will be rerunning your profile.
captains.victory_line: Prediction verified. The Collective Press Office will not print my paper, but the data is the data.
captains.defeat_line: Fascinating. My model was wrong. I will need to recalibrate.

captains.name: Tsovinar Areshian
captains.pre_combat_hail: Contract. Target ship. You. Walk or fight. Your call.

captains.name: Baedu Temi
captains.pre_combat_hail: Got a seat and a wrench. Don't have patience for boarders. You came through my claim. Back up or don't.
captains.surrender_line: Good. Fly straight out. Don't come back.

captains.name: Ngozi Amaechi
captains.pre_combat_hail: Eighteen miners dead last month on a line you just jumped. You run Guild freight, you run miner blood. Strike the line, strike the source. Pale Reckoning opening fire.
captains.surrender_line: Stand down. Your cargo goes to the Widows' Fund. Your ship becomes witness. Your name gets printed in the Union paper. Good or bad, your call.
captains.retreat_line: Regroup. The line remembers. The miners remember. We remember.
captains.victory_line: The Guild learns today. Eighteen names stay on the wall.
captains.defeat_line: They will spell my name wrong in the Guild papers. The Union papers will spell it right.

captains.name: Captain Wren Ostrovsky
captains.pre_combat_hail: So here we are. I'm Wren Ostrovsky, Departure Angle, courier-for-hire who sometimes hires himself to pirate. Today is one of those days. Your cargo's on my ledger. Pay, or pay the hard way.
captains.surrender_line: Cheers. I'll get you a receipt on Axiom for whatever I take. Makes the Guild tax office laugh.
captains.retreat_line: Calling it. Don't follow, I'm a bad shot on the run.
captains.victory_line: Good business. Worst part of this job's the paperwork.
captains.defeat_line: Fair fight. My regards to your navigator, if you keep one.

captains.name: Odalys Reyes-Hakizimana
captains.pre_combat_hail: Hello, captain. I am Odalys. The crew calls me Mother. I'd like you to hand over your rations. My kids need them more than yours do. Please don't make this difficult.
captains.surrender_line: Thank you, sweetheart. Yohan will help you with the transfer. Fly safely, the young ones can be twitchy on the dorsal gun.
captains.retreat_line: Back to the kids. We'll eat lighter tonight.
captains.victory_line: The little ones ate. That is what mattered.
captains.defeat_line: Tell my kids I got them some of the way. Yohan knows what to do next.

captains.name: Fyodor Lindqvist-Ngo
captains.pre_combat_hail: Name's Fyodor. Friends call me Trip. Ship's Fourth Try. I said that last time. Point is, this job's supposed to be my last. Make that true without anyone getting hurt, I'll thank you.
captains.surrender_line: Appreciated. Genuinely. The kid's waiting for me at Haven's. I'll tell her her dad's done.
captains.retreat_line: Out. Trip's not trying a fifth time. Trip means it this time.
captains.victory_line: That's the retirement fund. Thanks. Fly safe, captain.
captains.defeat_line: Huh. Well. Guess it really is the last one.

captains.name: Rhiannon Ji
captains.pre_combat_hail: Your portside maneuvering thruster is a Keller-Vos model four, third production year. I have been looking for one of those. Your ship is a specimen. Surrender it to my collection, or I'll harvest the part after.
captains.surrender_line: Careful, careful. The thruster is the only part I need. The rest of your vessel may fly out intact.
captains.retreat_line: The specimen escapes. I'll find another.
captains.victory_line: The collection grows. Your ship will sing better in pieces than it did whole.

captains.name: Marat Serik
captains.pre_combat_hail: Captain. Papa Serik speaking. Warm welcome to Breakstone space. I see Guild paper on your manifest, that is concerning for us. Let's talk, you and me. Talk, or you know.
captains.surrender_line: Beautiful. Beautiful. The Guild paper, we'll take. The miners will eat. You'll fly out friend-of-the-station. First drink on me next time you're in.
captains.retreat_line: Papa is going home. You remember this day, captain. We're warm folks, but we remember.
captains.victory_line: Shame it came to this. Tell the Guild Papa Serik sends his regards. I mean it.
captains.defeat_line: Good flying, captain. Drink's still on me if you come through.
